answers: Start snowboarding: take a lesson, learn to stop (heel edge), practice falling safely, and be patient — day 1 is tough.
Skiing vs snowboarding: skiing is easier day 1, snowboarding is easier to master long-term. Both are fun!
Tips: wear wrist guards, learn on gentle slopes, keep weight centered, and link turns before going steeper.
Snowboarding basics: determine stance (regular or goofy), practice on flat ground, then gentle slopes with turns.
